_about: Plain-language summaries + topic tags per publication, keyed by DOI. Picked up by build_html.py and rendered into publications.html. Topics drive the filter buttons; recognised values: pharm, oncology, repurpose, review, thesis. A pub can carry multiple space-separated topics.
_note: Rahaf currently has 1 OpenAlex work (15 cites) but the SerpAPI Scholar profile shows 4 papers. The OpenAlex record is split across three entities (A5104991276 is the active one). Entries below are topic-only for now; add TLDR strings as the thesis output gets published.

_no_doi_pubs._note: The Cancer Research abstract (A014) and BMC Medical Education paper do not currently have DOIs in dois.json. They are tagged via heuristics in build_html._infer_topics from title keywords (e.g. 'aprocitentan' -> repurpose+oncology, 'breast cancer awareness' -> pharm).
